chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Const. Petition No.D-6259 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. 27831/2024. 2. For direction on office objections Nos.1,10&22. 3. For orders on Misc. 27832/2024. 4. For orders on Misc. 27833/2024. 5. For hearing of main case. 16.12.2024. Mr. Hamid A. Memon, advocate...... 1. Granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2,4&5.This petition challenges the election result for the position of Member Governing Body (Metallurgy & Allied Group) Sindh Region of Pakistan Engineering Council’s elections held on 18.8.2024. We have heard learned counsel and at the very outset we enquired if respondent No.3 is performing functions in connection with the affairs of the government, he declined. It is an admitted fact that this is a private association and the elections are being convened independently on their own, hence in terms of Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, we are unable to intervene in the process of election of a private entity and nothing has been said that they are performing in connection with the affairs of the government. The petition being misconceived is dismissed alongith Misc. 27833/2024. Chief Justice Judge Ayub
